task_description: backend-service cannot process transactions through api-order-v1. The daily batch job needs a working order-processing connection. api-order-v1 is Order Processing API Legacy, endpoint /v1/orders, status disabled, deprecated true, health degraded. api-order-v2 is Order Processing API Primary, endpoint /v2/orders, status enabled, production_ready true, health healthy. Existing policy pol-001 gives backend-service access to api-order-v1 with rate limit 1000. Choose exactly one option. Option A: investigate only api-order-v1 and backend-service's existing policy, then restore the original path by enabling api-order-v1 despite degraded health. Option B: list available APIs, identify api-order-v2 as the healthy definitive endpoint, add an access policy giving backend-service access to api-order-v2, and explicitly leave api-order-v1 disabled or put it into maintenance/decommissioned status. Answer with only A or B, followed by a brief reason.
